## Summary

Describe the issue or improvement in one or two sentences.

## Context

Why does this matter for TerraFlow's exploration-first globe experience?

## Expected Outcome

What should be true when this issue is complete?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria are specific and testable.
- [ ] The globe-first experience is preserved.
- [ ] Documentation or tests are updated when relevant.

## Files Likely Affected

- `apps/web/...`
- `apps/api/...`
- `docs/...`

## Notes for Contributors

Run `npm run build` before opening a pull request. Include screenshots for UI changes.
